zh.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: 美國俄亥俄州馬寧波藍德 堂史普波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Świętopełk of Pomerania I於大約1074年出生在波蘭札德尼波莫斯吉申傑時，他的父親Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II30歲，母親Duchess Anna25歲。他於1128年與Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe在波蘭波莫斯吉格但斯克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1148年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Świętopełk of Pomerania I于大约1074年出生在波兰札德尼波莫斯吉申傑时，他的父亲Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II30岁，母亲Duchess Anna25岁。他于1128年与Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe在波兰波莫斯吉格但斯克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1148年之前。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

en.lifeSummary: When Świętopełk of Pomerania I was born about 1074, in Szczecin, West Pomerania, Poland, his father, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, was 30 and his mother, Duchess Anna, was 25. He married Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe in 1128, in Gdańsk, Pomerania, Poland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1148.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Świętopełk of Pomerania I est né environ 1074, à Szczecin, zachodniopomorskie, Pologne, son père, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Duchess Anna, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe en 1128, à Gdańsk, pomorskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1148.

de.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: Poland, Poland Township, Mahoning, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Świętopełk of Pomerania I um 1074 in Szczecin, zachodniopomorskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II 30 und seine Mutter Duchess Anna 25. Er hat 1128 in Danzig, pomorskie, Polen Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1148.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Świętopełk of Pomerania I è nato il circa 1074 nel Szczecin, zachodniopomorskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Anna, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe nel 1128, nel Gdańsk, pomorskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1148.

ja.lifeSummary: Świętopełk of Pomerania Iが約1074年にポーランドザチオドニオプオモースキスズクズエシンで生まれた時，父Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern IIは30歳，母Duchess Annaは25歳であった。1128年にポーランドポモースキグダnスクでDuchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margaretheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1148年以前に死去した。

ko.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: 미국 오하이오 주 머호닝 포랜드 타운시프 포랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Świętopełk of Pomerania I(이)가 대략 1074년 폴란드 잭드니오폼르스키 스즈치신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Anna(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1128년 폴란드 폼르스키 그다n스크에서 Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1148년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Świętopełk of Pomerania I nasceu aproximadamente 1074, em Szczecin, zachodniopomorskie, Polônia, seu pai, Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Anna, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe em 1128, em Gdańsk, pomorskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1148.

ru.Pommerin voivodikunta Poland, Pommerin v: поланд, поланд тоуншип, махонинг, Огайо, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Świętopełk of Pomerania I родился около 1074 г. в местности сзкзесин, зачодниопоморски, Польша, его отцу по имени Swantibor vel Świętobor "Pomorski" von Pommern II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Anna, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe в 1128 г. в местности гдаnск, поморски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1148 г.

Se casó con Duchess Of Eastern Pomerania Margarethe en 1128, en Gdańsk, pomorskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1148.
